name: 01_SQL_Injection_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(UNION\s+SELECT|1=1|--|/\*)" | stats count by src_ip, url | where count > 0

name: 02_Path_Traversal_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(\.\./\.\.|/etc/passwd|\\windows\\system32)" | stats count by src_ip, url | where count > 0

name: 03_SSRF_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1|169\.254\.169\.254)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 04_Command_Injection_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(;|\||`|\$)\s*(cat|ls|whoami|wget|curl)" | stats count by src_ip, url | where count > 0

name: 05_Brute_Force_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" (status=401 OR status=403) | stats count by src_ip | where count > 5

name: 06_Vulnerability_Scanner_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | regex http_user_agent="(?i)(sqlmap|nikto|nmap|dirb|wpscan|masscan)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 07_XSS_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(<script>|javascript:|onerror=)" | stats count by src_ip, url | where count > 0

name: 08_Sensitive_File_Discovery
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" status=200 | regex url="(?i)(\.env|\.git|\.bak|config\.php)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 09_IDOR_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | regex url="(?i)(user_id=\d+|account_id=\d+)" | stats dc(url) as unique_attempts by src_ip | where unique_attempts > 10

name: 10_Forceful_Browsing_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" status=404 | stats count by src_ip | where count > 20

name: 11_Web_Shell_Execution
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" status=200 | regex url="(?i)(cmd\.php|shell\.phtml|c99\.php|b374k)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 12_Malicious_File_Upload
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" method=POST | regex url="(?i)(\.php|\.exe|\.sh|\.jsp)\s+HTTP" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 13_Data_Exfiltration_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | stats sum(bytes_out) as total_bytes by src_ip | where total_bytes > 5000000

name: 14_Log_Injection_CRLF
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | eval decoded=urldecode(_raw) | regex decoded="(?i)(%0d%0a|\r\n)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0

name: 15_Automated_Bot_Detection
search: index=web_logs sourcetype="docker:millibluesec" | regex http_user_agent="(?i)(python-requests|curl|wget|go-http-client)" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 0
